2604.00785.title: Scalable Pretraining of Large Mixture of Experts Language Models on Aurora Super Computer
2604.00785.paper_summary: Pretraining Large Language Models (LLMs) from scratch requires massive amount of compute. Aurora super computer is an ExaScale machine with 127,488 Intel PVC (Ponte Vechio) GPU tiles. In this work, we showcase LLM pretraining on Aurora at the scale of 1000s of GPU tiles. Towards this effort, we developed Optimus, an inhouse training library with support for standard large model training techniques. Using Optimus, we first pretrained Mula-1B, a 1 Billion dense model and Mula-7B-A1B, a 7 Billion Mixture of Experts (MoE) model from scratch on 3072 GPU tiles for the full 4 trillion tokens of the OLMoE-mix-0924 dataset. We then demonstrated model scaling by pretraining three large MoE models Mula-20B-A2B, Mula-100B-A7B, and Mula-220B-A10B till 100 Billion tokens on the same dataset. On our largest model Mula-220B-A10B, we pushed the compute scaling from 384 to 12288 GPU tiles and observed scaling efficiency of around 90% at 12288 GPU tiles. We significantly improved the runtime performance of MoE models using custom GPU kernels for expert computation, and a novel EP-Aware sharded optimizer resulting in training speedups up to 1.71x. As part of the Optimus library, we also developed a robust set of reliability and fault tolerant features to improve training stability and continuity at scale.
2604.00785.paper_summary_zh: 從零開始預訓練大型語言模型（LLMs）需要大量的計算資源。Aurora 超級計算機是一台擁有 127,488 個 Intel PVC（Ponte Vechio）GPU 瓷磚的 ExaScale 機器。在這項工作中，我們展示了在 Aurora 上進行 LLM 預訓練，規模達到數千個 GPU 瓷磚。為了這項工作，我們開發了 Optimus，一個內部培訓庫，支持標準大型模型訓練技術。使用 Optimus，我們首先從零開始在 3072 個 GPU 瓷磚上預訓練了 Mula-1B，一個 10 億的稠密模型，以及 Mula-7B-A1B，一個 70 億的專家混合（MoE）模型，使用完整的 4 兆個 OLMoE-mix-0924 數據集的標記。然後，我們通過在同一數據集上預訓練三個大型 MoE 模型 Mula-20B-A2B、Mula-100B-A7B 和 Mula-220B-A10B，展示了模型擴展性，直到 100 億個標記。在我們最大的模型 Mula-220B-A10B 上，我們將計算擴展從 384 推進到 12288 個 GPU 瓷磚，並觀察到在 12288 個 GPU 瓷磚上的擴展效率約為 90%。我們使用自定義 GPU 核心來計算專家，顯著提高了 MoE 模型的運行時性能，並採用了新穎的 EP-Aware 分片優化器，使訓練速度提高了最多 1.71 倍。作為 Optimus 庫的一部分，我們還開發了一套強大的可靠性和容錯特性，以提高大規模訓練的穩定性和連續性。
2604.00785.author: Dharma Teja Vooturi et.al.
2604.00785.authors: Dharma Teja Vooturi, Dhiraj Kalamkar, Dipankar Das, Bharat Kaul
